title: Persona-Based Social Media Post
scenario: Create a social media post for a new fitness app targeting 18-30-year-old college students. The post should focus on the app's features and benefits.
constraints: Use a fun and motivational tone

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt is within the 120-character limit and uses a fun and motivational tone.
Assess if the post accurately targets the 18-30-year-old college student persona.
Verify that the post highlights the app's features and benefits relevant to the target audience.
